Original Client Requirement (verbatim): Delete lifecycle updates linked KPI counts correctly
Setup Data: Term seeded with invoices/payments + dashboard KPI baseline captured
Actions: Delete target record from list view and refresh KPI/dashboard/report pages
Expected Result: Record is soft deleted and KPI/report totals decrement correctly

Original Client Requirement (verbatim): Restore lifecycle updates linked KPI counts correctly
Actions: Restore target record and refresh KPI/dashboard/report pages
Expected Result: Record returns and KPI/report totals increment back to baseline

Original Client Requirement (verbatim): Purge lifecycle permanently removes records from KPI/report totals
Setup Data: Use soft-deleted record eligible for purge
Actions: Purge record and refresh KPI/dashboard/report pages
Expected Result: Record permanently removed and KPI/report totals remain consistent

Original Client Requirement (verbatim): Cross-report totals are consistent under same term/date filters
Setup Data: Set one agreed term + date range filter
Actions: Run each linked dashboard/report with same filter values and reconcile totals
Expected Result: Totals match or documented, approved exception exists

Expected Result: All critical paths complete and no 5xx/tracebacks in logs
